transcript.text: I took out my eyebrow machine. I made it myself with the lawnmower tire at the local hardware store.
I got the little bar at the hardware store, too. I cut it.
My handle is duct tape, and I took the tire from rolling around with this little thing.
U-bolt thing I bought at the hardware store, too.
I couldn't find this thing for sale at any of the sporting goods stores, so I made one myself.
It appears to work fine, so there you go.
